specializations: Microencapsulation specialist for personal care and cosmetics
Custom microcapsule development and contract manufacturing
product_highlights: Coacervation microcapsules — double-wall gelatin/gum arabic shells for sensitive cosmetic actives
WaxCap™ — wax matrix microcapsules for controlled thermal-triggered release
SpheraBio™ — biodegradable microcapsules complying with EU microplastics regulations
Custom microencapsulation of retinol, vitamin C, peptides, and botanical extracts
notes: Sphera Encapsulation is an Italian microencapsulation specialist with deep expertise in coacervation, spray-cooling, and spray-drying technologies for personal care and cosmetic applications. Their SpheraBio™ biodegradable microcapsule platform is a direct response to EU microplastics regulations, providing compliant alternatives for rinse-off product developers. Sphera offers comprehensive custom microencapsulation services from feasibility through commercial-scale manufacturing, making them a versatile European partner for SKIN-TWIN's active delivery and regulatory compliance optimization.
